trim: L, LE, SE, XLE and gasoline trims
engine: Gasoline engines, including A25A-FKS 2.5L and 2GR-FKS 3.5L where equipped

maintenance.service: Rotate tires; inspect wiper blades, fluid levels, and brake linings/pads
maintenance.notes: Toyota maintenance log page 38 begins the repeating 5,000-mile service pattern.

maintenance.service: Replace engine oil and oil filter

interval.logic: Every 10,000 miles or 12 months when the specified 0W-16 or 0W-20 oil is used

maintenance.notes: Use 5,000 miles or 6 months under listed special operating conditions or if alternate mineral oil was used.

interval.logic: Shown at 10,000 miles/12 months and recurring in the maintenance log

maintenance.notes: Heavy traffic, dirt, urban, desert, or dusty areas may shorten filter life.
Special operating conditions may require automatic transmission fluid replacement at 60,000-mile intervals.

applicability: Special-condition services remain conditional and must not be presented as normal-use requirements
validation_flags: Candidate rebuilt from official Toyota warranty and maintenance guide.
Rendered-page verification still required before production integration.
Toyota special operating condition footnotes must remain condition-scoped.
